cycle: deep fused-expert QAT fix: mechanism VALIDATED, full deploy blocked by peft/parametrize recursion
headline: BREAKTHROUGH + BLOCKER. A fake-quant STE torch-parametrization on the fused OlmoeExperts base params DOES co-adapt the experts (proof: layer-0 gate_up_proj train-mode fake-quant rel-err 0.094 = correct NVFP4 magnitude; expert lora_B nonzero-grad 31/31). BUT registering it on >1 param / the nested peft ParamWrapper throws RecursionError (only 1/32 register) -> torch parametrize vs peft ParamWrapper.__getattr__.

investigation.structure: peft wraps OlmoeExperts as a DOUBLY-NESTED ParamWrapper: `experts` (LoRA on down_proj) -> `.base_layer` (ParamWrapper, LoRA on gate_up_proj) -> `.base_layer.base_layer.{gate_up_proj,down_proj}` = the real frozen 3-D params. Each ParamWrapper uses torch parametrize + a dynamic `_activate_lora` context (ParamWrapper.forward at peft lora/layer.py:2442) to inject the LoRA into the param during base_layer(x).
investigation.why_attach_qat_missed_it: attach_qat wraps only type=='Linear' modules with .weight; OlmoeExperts is neither -> expert coverage 0 (offline invariants can't see it).
investigation.validated_mechanism: register a FakeQuantSTE parametrization (W -> W+(nvfp4(W)-W).detach(), gated by owner.training/_qat_bypass) on the fused base param. Layer-0 proof: fake-quant applied in train mode (rel-err 0.094) AND all 31 expert lora_B grads flow -> the experts co-adapt to the NVFP4 grid. This is a real, working solution to the ledger's OPEN 'fused-expert QAT-compose' lever.
investigation.remaining_blocker: register_parametrization on a 2nd param of / the nested peft ParamWrapper -> RecursionError (peft ParamWrapper.__getattr__ forwards to base_layer, colliding with torch parametrize). 1/32 registered.
fix_directions: (a) Bypass torch parametrize: wrap ParamWrapper.forward so that inside its `_activate_lora` window it also STE-fake-quants the effective (base+LoRA) param -> applies AFTER the LoRA (correct serve-order fake_quant(base+delta)), avoids the multi-param parametrize recursion.
(b) recursion-safe registration (register on each base param before peft activates, or raise sys.setrecursionlimit + confirm it terminates -- risky if infinite).
VERIFY any fix via: the runtime coverage line showing expert>0, per-expert fake-quant magnitude ~0.1, and expert lora grads flowing on a real step -- NOT the offline invariants.

actions: No code shipped from the deep fix (unverified STE would risk a misleading v6 number). The 0-expert ABORT guard (train_lora.py, work 406090ee + spark-bridge 72aa65a5) stays -> v6 cannot silently waste hours. v6 remains HELD until the fused-expert QAT reach is fixed + runtime-verified.
shippable_now: v5 + --keep-top-experts 16 + conformal-abstention-serve -> ~94.5% answered @ ~0.975, no train (does not need v6).
guardrailsAck: canClaimAGI=false (no v6 number produced; mechanism validated but full fix unverified -> not claimed); lint_claims OK; no plaintext secrets; JUDGE_HOLD set+cleared around each probe; no code shipped unverified.
open: Land the fused-expert QAT fix via direction (a) + rigorous runtime verification (the mechanism is proven; the recursion is the only remaining problem).
World-model real-model ablation (cloud step 2) still pending.
